## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check src/ tests/`
- [ ] `ruff format --check src/ tests/`
- [ ] `pytest -q --tb=short`

## Compatibility

- [ ] Public APIs, CLI commands, MCP tools, and documented config remain compatible, or the migration path is documented.
- [ ] Optional backend tests skip cleanly when the corresponding extra is not installed.
